ingested_by: claude-code-noos (cockpit ingest lane NOOS-LANE-p08-rewitness-ingest; NOTE: this agent authored commit ea34b10 on the graded branch and therefore did NOT act as witness — record-and-verify only)

recorded_fields.independent_verdict: NOT_PASS_P05 — remains CANDIDATE_READY_FOR_REWITNESS (re-witness CONFIRMS the builder's non-award)

cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.method: read-only artifact cross-checks on main/worktree at bbd8518; no test reruns
cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.provenance_divergence: CONFIRMED — bundle/live-tests.json (frozen in-session record) states 05_worker_termination=FAIL ('kill=0 reap=PENDING fence 2→0 stale=409') and 07_append_only_ledger=FAIL ('deleteDenied=false runtimeUser=graph_kernel_runtime') while per-test files, P08_VERDICT.json and manifest.json claim PASS. Proof set is internally inconsistent.
cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.fencing_regression: CONFIRMED — 05 per-test artifact itself records fencing_before=2, fencing_after=0 (non-monotonic; replacement not higher-generation).
cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.sha_drift: CONFIRMED — 01 artifact embeds healthz commit_sha=1c11b447 (the pre-merge deploy); no proof ran against deployed bbd8518; the #162 fencing-preserve change (reap DELETE→UPDATE) landed AFTER proofgen and alters exactly the test-05 path. Cockpit had independently flagged this in the prior CHECK.
cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.role_wash: CONFIRMED — services/graph-kernel-staging/src/server.ts:504 hardcodes process.env.GRAPH_KERNEL_SKIP_SET_ROLE="1"; service connects as owner; graph_kernel_runtime separation is cosmetic.
cockpit_verification_of_witness_claims.healthz_env_asserted: CONFIRMED by construction — deploy script sets GRAPH_KERNEL_COMMIT_SHA env from git HEAD; /healthz reports the env value, not a build-derived hash.

hard_blockers_remaining: 05_fencing_still_washed: disjunctive PASS predicate (queue_message_id && finalSucceeded) can carry PASS around fencing failure; fencing_after=0; commit path TOCTOU (no atomic WHERE fencing_token=$n); reaper transition SQL-forced so the real railway kill was inert
provenance_divergence: internally inconsistent proof set (bundle FAIL vs per-test PASS for 05, 07)
sha_drift_not_inert: no proof ran against deployed bbd8518; healthz commit_sha env-asserted
lesser_findings: 07 role wash (append-only enforcement itself is real via owner-proof triggers; runtime-role claim cosmetic)
08 single telemetry source (needs >=2 independent sources incl. run_events LLM_USAGE)

gate_decision.rule: Open only on PASS_P05_CONFIRMED or PASS_P05_WITH_NONBLOCKING_FINDINGS.
gate_decision.decision: Gate stays closed. Two independent witness rounds now agree with each other and with the builder's own non-award.

machine_route: Runway builder lane: (1) fix 05 for real — monotonic fencing on reclaim, atomic fenced commit (WHERE fencing_token=$n), reaper must act on genuinely expired leases without SQL-forcing, kill via real process termination; (2) make the proof pipeline single-source so bundle and per-test files cannot diverge (one writer, fail-closed on mismatch); (3) derive healthz commit_sha from build, not env; (4) drop the GRAPH_KERNEL_SKIP_SET_ROLE=1 wash or re-scope the 07 claim; (5) add second zero-LLM telemetry source; (6) rerun the full suite against the deployed SHA so audited == deployed == proof-embedded healthz; then re-witness round 3.
